ルディアさん。すみません……せっかく働かせてもらっているのに、<br>どうしても:
Ludia, I am sorry... Even though you are giving me the opportunity to
work, I just get so embarrassed... I could not finish today either.
ずいぶん弱気になっているようね。あなたらしくない。<br>……諦める？: You seem quite discouraged. That's not like you. ... Going to give up?
……いえ、まだ頑張りたいであります。<br>でも、どうしたら解決するか分からなく: No, I still wish to do my best. But I do not know how to resolve this...
そうねぇ。ちょっと荒療治になるけど、今日のイベント、参加してみる？<br>常連だ:
Let's see. It might be a bit of a drastic treatment, but how about
joining today's event? It's a special one only regulars can attend.
イベント……参加してみたいであります！<br>それで解決する可能性が、少しでもあ:
An event... I would like to participate! If there is even a small chance
it could solve this!
分かったわ。それじゃあ、行きましょうか♪: Got it. Well then, let's go!♪
ルディアに連れていかれたのは、娼館でもあまり使われない<br>大部屋の扉の前だっ:
Ludia led her to the door of a large room that was rarely used even in
the brothel.
この扉の向こうが、イベント会場よ。ここからは１人だけど、頑張ってね♪<br>でも:
Behind this door is the event venue. From here on, you're on your
own, but do your best!♪ But if you think it's too much, don't push yourself and come out, okay?
…………？ 分かったであります。<br>でも、簡単に逃げるわけにはいかないであり: ...? Understood. But I cannot simply run away! I will do my best!
ベティは気合を入れると、扉を開く。<br>直後――ベティに押し寄せてきたのは、む:
Betty steeled herself and opened the door. Immediately—what washed
over Betty was a suffocating wave of hot air and the moans of men and women.
え……！？ こ、これは、どういうことでありますか……！？: Eh...!? Wh-what is the meaning of this...!?
男女合わせて数十名はいる。娼婦は衣服をはだけて裸体をさらし、<br>客の男たちも:
Dozens of men and women filled the room. Courtesans and customers
alike were naked, their bodies entwined everywhere.
不思議なのは、その場にいるものたちのいずれもが、<br>はっきり顔が見えないこと:
What was strange was that the faces of all those present were not
clearly visible.
この乱交パーティの参加者たちは、互いに顔が分からなくなる魔法を<br>かけてある:
Participants in this orgy are under a spell that makes their faces
unrecognizable. You too. So do your best!♪
（頑張る……？ 頑張るって、いったいどうすれば……）: (Do my best...? What am I supposed to do...?)
ルディアに問おうにも、既に扉は閉じられた。<br>ふと……ベティは自分の背後に誰:
Even as she tried to ask Ludia, the door was already closed. Then,
suddenly... Betty noticed someone standing behind her.
お、娼婦の補充か。ちょうどいい、相手してくれよ。<br>ついでに、このおもちゃも:
Oi, a new courtesan? Just in time. Service me. And I'll be using this
toy too.
